// Code generated by github.com/romshark/datapages; DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

// POSTPageIndexFilter references /filter/
func POSTPageIndexFilter(query QueryPOSTPageIndexFilter) string {
	var (
		activeStr string
	)

	if query.Active {
		activeStr = strconv.FormatBool(query.Active)
	}

	anyQuery := query.Active

	var b strings.Builder
	l := len("@post('/filter/") + len("')")
	if anyQuery {
		l += len("?")
	}
	n := 0
	if query.Active {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		l += len("active=") + len(activeStr)
	}

	b.Grow(l)

	b.WriteString("@post('/filter/")
	if anyQuery {
		b.WriteString("?")
	}
	n = 0
	if query.Active {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		b.WriteString("active=")
		b.WriteString(activeStr)
	}
	b.WriteString("')")

	return b.String()
}

type QueryPOSTPageIndexFilter struct {
	Active bool `query:"active"`
}
